description:
Follow us on IG before your showing @BXbestRentals to receive daily updates, and special pricing on available apartments across our entire portfolio of properties!

Currently trying to find a new place to call home? Look no further! The Equestrian at Pelham Parkway has everything you need. Long before The Equestrian was even a thought, 1680 Pelham Parkway was home to one of the most iconic horse stables in the Bronx. The community referred to it as "a little piece of heaven." The Equestrian plans to bring the same love, warmth and history to this new construction. This building will bring 129 luxury apartments, offering a state of the art fitness center, on site laundry, ample parking and we are also pet friendly. The Equestrian is surrounded by NYC parks, Trump Links golf courses, cycling and hiking paths, malls, shops and hospitals. Major highways, including I-95 and the Hutchison River Parkway, and public transportation are also within a stone's throw, making this building a commuters dream. City Island, being a short 5 minute commute away, offers amazing dining and entertainment options. For the last handful of years the Bronx has been an up and coming, more affordable solution to living in Manhattan. However that era is over, The Bronx is Now!

About The Riverdale Tower at 3745 Riverdale Avenue:
Follow us on IG @BXbestRentals to receive daily updates, and special pricing on available apartments across our entire portfolio of over 3500 rental apartments.
2 MONTHS FREE ON 24 MONTH LEASE! 
1 MONTHS FREE ON 12 MONTH LEASE 
Move quickly to secure your new home in the newest and most convenient apartments in Riverdale. Located conveniently off the Henry Hudson Parkway with close proximity to Manhattan, Bronx Botanical Garden, Bronx Zoo, and the Bronx's historical Van Courtlandt Park. The neighborhood also boasts several nearby schools and colleges, an ideal location for students of all ages. There is no shortage of entertainment with two premiere golf courses mere blocks away and some of the best casual and fine dining cafes, and nightlife options in the area.

All apartments feature kitchens with all modern stainless-steel appliances including in-unit Washer and Dryer, luxury tiled bathrooms, installed lighting, and natural hardwood floors throughout to maintain the historic character of the Bronx neighborhood. Amenities include state of the art gym, community room and outdoor patios, pickleball court, fire pits and much more. Onsite indoor assigned parking available for additional fee. Note: some featured apartments include their own private balconies.

These luxurious apartments are beautiful inside and out... contact us today for more information before they are all gone! NO BROKER FEE!

Move quickly to secure your new home at 5959 Broadway, the newest and most convenient apartments in the Bronx. Set just next to Van Cortland Park and less than a mile from the Bronx Botanical Garden, these luxurious apartments are beautiful inside and out.

No expense was spared in this new development. All apartments feature all modern stainless steel appliances needed to make cooking a fun and easy experience. You will find escape and relaxation in updated bathrooms with all-updated features and amenities. Both installed lighting and ample natural light bring a lively energy to each cozy home. Natural wood floors throughout maintain the historic character of the Bronx neighborhood.

No matter your need – with availability from studios to 2 bedroom options! – your home at 5959 Broadway is your getaway from the world, and a perfect place to entertain guests.

Located at the 242nd Street Station, you are never far from where you need to go. Families will love the proximity to the Bronx Zoo and Van Cortland Park. With several nearby schools and colleges, it is an ideal location for students of all ages.

There is no shortage of entertainment, no matter how you like to spend your time. Two premiere golf courses are mere blocks away. Some of the best casual and fine dining, cafes, and nightlife options in New York are right down the road. And, at the end of the day, find yourself back in the safe comfort of your apartment at 5959 Broadway.
 
Call now to schedule a tour before these phenomenally priced new apartments are all gone.

description:
Dedicated Student and Intern Housing. We require proof of enrollment in a college/university or proof of internship acceptance for university credit. 

FOUND Study Columbia Heights (97 Columbia Heights) and FOUND Study Brooklyn Heights (119 Columbia Heights) offer furnished private studios, shared stuios, and shared 2 and 3 bedroom apartments on the waterfront promenade of Brooklyn Heights!  Units include either a kitchenette or full kitchen.

Residents enjoy shared amenities including communal kitchens, lounges, gyms, study rooms, and access to the FOUND promotions, and resident services. Our rental price includes furniture, high-speed wifi, and all utilities. Move-in ready!

Located on the beautiful waterfront of Brooklyn Heights, FOUND Study is steps from public transportation, eateries, and shopping centers. We welcome you to come and experience FOUND Study where we are redefining modern student housing.

- Subway: 5 min walk
- Brooklyn Bridge Park: 5 min walk
- Closest Grocery Store: 4 min walk

Furniture Included: 
Twin XL Bed
Desk and Chair
Dresser
Hanging space

Not included - Linens, Pillows, Towels, or decorations

Let us help you make your move a seamlessly enjoyable experience with virtual tours and a quick online application and approval process. Call today for more information!!!

The Vitagraph celebrates the quintessential “old Brooklyn” neighborhood of Midwood while bringing modern living back to the forefront. Paying homage to its historical grounds, the developers took pride in preserving the iconic smokestack—a distinctive tower and elegant salute to the early days of motion picture studios. Offering a comprehensive suite of brand new amenities spaces, The Vitagraph is a truly inspired living experience.

description:
Set along Astoria's picturesque waterfront, Halletts Point intricately intertwines modern residential towers, vibrant green spaces, endless views, abundant amenities, and the warmth of the Astoria neighborhood.
 
Luxuriate in elevated living with breathtaking views, generous layouts, finely crafted finishes, thoughtful details, and sustainable material choices. Savor the ultimate modern kitchen appointed with polished quartz countertops, custom cabinetry, paneled dishwasher, and under-cabinet lighting. Enjoy high-performance stainless steel appliances including natural gas cooktop and high-speed oven. Unwind in thoughtfully appointed bathrooms that feature Italian cabinetry, floating vanities, and Grohe fixtures.
 
62,500 square feet of amenities provide ample room to relax, recreate, and indulge. Offerings include an outdoor pool with sweeping city and river views, BBQ grills and alfresco dining areas, state-of-the-art fitness centers, lounges, game room, screening room, recording studio, coworking lounge, children’s playrooms, and more.
 
Additional convenience features: 24-hour concierge/doorman • onsite supermarket • attended parking garages • onsite leasing center and property management • exclusive resident shuttle • keyless access

FARE Act Disclosure.  This listing is intended to be used by prospective renters and may not be republished without the prior written consent of The Durst Organization. Absent an express written agreement or acknowledgment to the contrary, The Durst Organization and its affiliates (1) do not utilize the services of third-party brokers or agents in connection with the rental of residential apartments and (2) will not assume responsibility for any brokerage fees incurred by a prospective renter. The Durst Organization and its affiliates will not charge or collect fees from a prospective renter except for such fees as permitted by law and disclosed to the prospective renter.

description:
** RATES INCLUDE: $100 per week food credit for Wonder Spot app, all utilities, complimentary laundry and on-site gym!! **

The Webster Apartments is Downtown Brooklyn’s premier co-living residence exclusively for WOMEN, offering flexible, short-term housing for women working, studying, or interning in New York City. The Webster Apartments in Downtown Brooklyn provides flexible, fully furnished housing designed specifically for women who are enrolled in college/university programs, engaged in internships, or a working professional in NYC. Proof of enrollment, internship placement, or employment is required. See our website for more information. 

Located at 229 Duffield Street, just steps from major subway lines, Webster offers a variety of private and shared accommodations, including fully furnished studios, one-bedroom, and a two-bedroom suite. Each unit includes essential furnishings such as a twin or full bed, desk and chair, dresser, bookshelf, under bed drawers, electronic safe, and closet space—plus a 4.9 cu sq ft refrigerator with spacious freezer AND an 8-in-1 microwave/air fryer combination appliance!

Our rent includes all utilities, high-speed Wi-Fi, on-site laundry, and a weekly meal credit that can be used with Wonder, a convenient app-based meal delivery partner. Residents also enjoy secure building access, 24/7 security, a fitness center, community lounge, rooftop terrace, and bike storage (for a nominal fee).

Set in the heart of Downtown Brooklyn, Webster Apartments offers easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment. Live steps from public transportation with quick connections to Manhattan and beyond.

Subway: 3 min walk

City Point (Trader Joe’s, DeKalb Market Hall): 3 min walk

Brooklyn Bridge: 10 min walk

Final room layouts and furniture may differ from renderings. The list of standard furniture which is included in all rooms is outlined above. Furniture may be modified in some rooms (ie: handicap accessible rooms, double rooms, etc.) and will be listed on the room description. Suites include a kitchen countertop with cabinet and/or shelf space and a kitchen sink. Extra/unwanted furniture cannot be removed from any room. Room options and sizes vary and will be available/assigned in the order in which applications are received and reservation terms finalized.

NOTE: Décor, artwork and furnishings shown are NOT included in any room. This includes (but is not limited to): desk accessories, area rugs, throw blankets, pillows, bedding, cups, plates, desk accessories, etc. 

Let us make your transition to city living smooth and simple with an easy online application and fast approvals. Contact us today for more information and availability!

description: 21 Chelsea offers stylish apartments in New York City. These Chelsea apartments feature oak hardwood flooring and modern kitchens complete with stainless steel appliances. Enjoy our 24-hour concierge and doorman, premier resident services, and breathtaking views of New York City from our rooftop terrace. In addition, enjoy convenient access to the 23rd Street subway station, Union Square, and the vibrant nightlife of Chelsea. Quaint cafes, unique shops, and art galleries add to the neighborhood’s diversity. If you’re looking for luxury apartments near Chelsea Manhattan, tour 21 Chelsea today for upscale living. No Fee Apartments.

description:
PARKCHESTER is one of NYC's safest and most walkable neighborhoods with a private police department on 24-hour patrol. Our spacious 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments feature elegant, windowed kitchens with sleek new cabinets, new appliances, granite countertops, and stainless-steel sinks and faucets. The apartments feature hardwood floors.  Many feature newly renovated windowed bathrooms. You will be surrounded by 129 acres of lush parks, diverse cultures, and enticing restaurants. Parkchester is self-contained with its own post office, blink Fitness, banks, supermarkets, Macy's, Marshall's, Zaro, Chipotle and onsite medical and dental offices. Conveniently located to Montefiore and Jacobi Hospitals. It's a 30-minute commute to midtown via express bus or mass transit. Households with rental assistance are welcome to apply. 

Parkchester complies with NYS’s Tenant Blacklisting law. We will not review tenant court records or housing court histories when considering your housing application

Please note: All apartment rents are subject to change without notice and are not guaranteed. Listed apartments are rented on a first-come, first-served basis to qualified renters.

description: Rent your own private & furnished bedroom within a shared apartment suite!  No need for you to find roommates, because The Reserve already has a vibrant community of residents.  Enjoy many free perks as part of your bedroom rental, including: free Wifi, free stocked supplies in the apartment, an in-unit washer-dryer, free periodic cleaning services, private temperature control, as well as free access to all of The Reserve's breathtaking amenity spaces!  Upon signing for your private bedroom rental, you'll receive your smartphone key, and you'll be registered to receive your packages at the Amazon Package Locker system in the lobby.  Sorry, no pets are permitted in shared apartments (with minor exceptions).  Join us at The Reserve - and book your bedroom today!
